Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.continueEmptyDescription: Start a practice set or browse the syllabus to pick up here next time.
Dashboard.todayCurrentAffairsNone: No current affairs published today yet
Dashboard.performanceNoScores: Complete a test to see your score trend.
Dashboard.weaknessEmptyDescription: Answer a few MCQs across topics and we'll flag where to focus.
Dashboard.spotlightEmptyTitle: Get AI feedback on your answers
Dashboard.spotlightEmptyDescription: Submit a Mains-style answer and get rubric-based scoring in seconds.
Dashboard.guidedSubtitle: Finish these to keep your streak.
Dashboard.heatmapIntro: Every day you study lights up. Days where you finished the whole Today checklist are Perfect Days.
Dashboard.freezeUsed: Freeze used — streak safe. You missed a day, but a banked freeze kept your streak alive.

Learn.title: Learn
Learn.description: Browse the UPPSC syllabus, mapped paper by paper.
Learn.emptyDescription: We couldn't find any syllabus topics right now.
Learn.paperNotFoundDescription: This paper doesn't exist or hasn't been loaded yet.
Learn.nodeNotFoundDescription: This syllabus topic doesn't exist or has been removed.
Learn.noPyqsDescription: Previous-year questions for this topic will appear here once they're published.
Learn.noRelatedCurrentAffairsDescription: Updates linked to this topic will show up here as they're published.
Learn.mapIntro: Your Conquest Map. Each territory is a syllabus section, sized by how often UPPSC asks it and coloured by your mastery. Pulsing tiles are high-weight sections you haven't secured yet — start there. Tap any territory to open it.
Learn.mapEmptyDescription: This paper has no PYQ-weighted sections to map yet.
Learn.addToRevisionFailed: Couldn't add to revision. Please try again.

Practice.title: Practice
Practice.emptyDescription: New practice sets are added regularly — check back soon.
Practice.customEmptyTitle: No custom sets yet — build one above
Practice.resultNoTopicsDescription: None of these questions were mapped to a syllabus topic.
Practice.resultNotFoundDescription: This attempt doesn't exist, isn't yours, or hasn't been submitted yet.
Practice.instructionOneQuestion: One question is shown per screen — use the palette or arrow keys to move between them.
Practice.instructionAutosave: Your answers are saved automatically as you go, even on a shaky connection.
Practice.instructionPalette: The numbered palette shows answered, marked, and unanswered questions at a glance.
Practice.instructionNegativeMarking: Negative marking applies: {{pct}}% deducted per wrong answer.
Practice.instructionNoNegativeMarking: No negative marking on this test.
Practice.testNotFoundDescription: This test doesn't exist or hasn't been published yet.
Practice.dailyArchiveDescription: Today's quiz, yesterday's makeup, and every past day.
Practice.dailyEmptyDescription: The first daily quiz is assembled at 5 AM IST — check back soon.
Practice.mockDescription: UPPSC-pattern papers with real one-third negative marking.
Practice.cutoffQualified: You'd clear the CSAT qualifying bar
Practice.leaveConfirmDescription: Your progress on this attempt hasn't been submitted yet. If you leave now, you can still resume later — your answers are autosaved — but the timer keeps running.
Practice.submitSyncFailed: Couldn't confirm your last answer was saved. Check your connection and try submitting again.

Answers.title: Answer Writing
Answers.description: Write Mains-style answers and get AI-evaluated feedback.
Answers.emptyDescription: Descriptive questions will appear here once they're published.
Answers.todaysQuestionEmptyDescription: A fresh Mains question will appear here once descriptive questions are published.
Answers.writeOwnDescription: Practice with any Mains-style question you choose — type it in and get the same rubric-based evaluation.
Answers.historyEmptyDescription: Your evaluated answers will show up here with their scores.
Answers.writeRoomDescription: Write your answer, then submit for AI evaluation.
Answers.writeRoomQuestionNotFound: This question could not be found.
Answers.customQuestionPlaceholder: Type or paste the question you want to practice...
Answers.submitError: Couldn't submit your answer. Please try again.
Answers.evaluationDescription: AI-evaluated feedback against the UPPSC rubric.
Answers.evaluationNotFoundDescription: This evaluation may have been removed or never existed.
Answers.handwrittenUploadHint: Photograph each page flat, in good light, in order — up to 6 pages.
Answers.handwrittenRejectedFiles_one: {{count}} file wasn't an image and was skipped.
Answers.handwrittenRejectedFiles_other: {{count}} files weren't images and were skipped.
Answers.confirmDescription: Check the transcription against your photos before it's evaluated.
Answers.confirmHint: Read it against your photos and fix anything the model misread before evaluating.
Answers.confirmLowConfidenceHint: Confidence is low — parts of your handwriting were hard to read. Please check the text carefully.
Answers.ocrTranscribingHint: This can take a little while for longer answers…
Answers.ocrTipLighting: Use bright, even lighting — avoid shadows across the page.
Answers.ocrTipFlat: Lay the page flat and fill the frame with just that page.
Answers.ocrTipFocus: Hold the camera steady so the text is in sharp focus.
Answers.dailySetDescription: Descriptive practice rotating across the GS papers.
Answers.dailySetEmpty: No answer-writing questions are available yet.
Answers.handwrittenOverflowFiles: {{count}} photo(s) skipped — max {{max}} pages per answer.

CurrentAffairs.title: Current Affairs
CurrentAffairs.emptyDescription: Today's roundup will appear here once it's published.
CurrentAffairs.quizError: No practice questions available yet for this period.

Revision.title: Revision
Revision.description: Spaced repetition to lock in what you've learned.
Revision.emptyDescription: Add cards from questions, notes, and current affairs as you study — or seed your deck instantly from what you've already done.
Revision.seedNoteFacts: Add key facts from notes I've read
Revision.seedWrongAnswersEmpty: No wrong answers yet — attempt some practice questions first.
Revision.seedNoteFactsResult: Added {{count}} card(s) from notes you've read.
Revision.seedNoteFactsEmpty: No read notes yet — open a topic's Notes tab first.
Revision.allCaughtUpDescription: No cards are due right now — check back later or browse the forecast above.
Revision.noDueCardsDescription: You're all caught up. Come back when the next batch is due.
Revision.tapToReveal: Tap or press space to reveal

Profile.title: Profile
Profile.trajectoryDescription: Your test scores over time, by paper.
Profile.trajectoryEmptyDescription: Attempt a PYQ paper or sectional test to start tracking your trajectory here.
Profile.accuracyTimeDescription: Are you rushing, or overthinking? Accuracy grouped by how long you spent per question.
Profile.accuracyTimeEmptyDescription: Answer more MCQs in Practice to see how your speed relates to your accuracy.
Profile.matrixDescription: Top-level topics across your papers, sorted by exam weight. Weak-but-heavily-asked topics glow.
Profile.matrixEmptyDescription: Attempt some PYQs under Practice or Learn to populate this matrix.
Profile.matrixGlowHint: Glowing rows are weak topics that carry heavy exam weight — study these next.
Profile.writingProgressDescription: How your evaluated answers are trending, dimension by dimension.
Profile.writingProgressEmptyDescription: Submit an answer for AI evaluation under Answers to start building this chart.
Profile.improvementEmptyDescription: Re-attempt a question after reading its feedback to see your improvement here.
Profile.settingsExportHint: Download everything you've written, submitted, and scored as one JSON file.
Profile.changePasswordHint: Update the password you use to sign in.
Profile.dangerZoneHint: Account deletion will be available soon.

Review.title: Review Queue
Review.description: Approve, edit, or reject AI-generated questions before they go live.
Review.disabledDescription: Set ADMIN_MODE=true in apps/api/.env and restart the API to review generated questions.
Review.emptyDescription: Nothing is waiting for review in this tab. Generate more with pnpm qgen.
Review.question: Question
Review.keyboardHint: j / k to move · a approve · e edit · r reject
Review.footerNote: Approving publishes a question through the same bilingual gate as PYQ ingestion.

Trends.title: PYQ Weightage & Trends
Trends.description: How often each topic has been asked over the last decade.
Trends.dormantHint: Overdue — high past frequency, long gap
Trends.emptyDescription: Trends appear once year-tagged PYQs are loaded for this paper.
Trends.notFoundDescription: This paper has no syllabus yet.

Notes.emptyDescription: Study notes for this topic haven't been published yet. Check back soon.
Notes.ourWordsNote: Notes are written in our own words and grounded in cited sources — never reproduced from any book or coaching material.
Notes.factCardBack: Recall this fact for the exam.
Notes.addToRevisionFailed: Couldn't add to revision. Please try again.

ReviewNotes.emptyDescription: Generated study notes awaiting review will appear here.

Magazine.indexDescription: Each month's current affairs, compiled into a print-ready bilingual digest.
Magazine.emptyDescription: No published current affairs for this month yet.
Magazine.footer: Compiled in our own words from published sources. For UPPSC exam preparation.

TimeAttack.title: CSAT Time Attack
TimeAttack.pitch: Ten CSAT questions, five minutes, one tap each. Instant right/wrong, a combo flame for a hot streak, and your personal best to beat. Speed with accuracy is exactly what CSAT rewards.

Ghost.title: Ghost Battle
Ghost.raceThisAgainHint: Replay this set against past-you and see if you've sped up.
Ghost.markerTitle: Where past-you was at this point last time
Ghost.masteryNote: Your mastery has been updated from this run.
Ghost.errorDescription: This attempt can't be raced right now.

Mentor.title: AI Mentor
Mentor.pageDescription: Ask doubts — grounded in your syllabus and your own prep.
Mentor.emptyHint: Concepts, distinctions, PYQ doubts, current affairs — I answer from the platform's content and cite my sources.
Mentor.quizIntro: A quick quiz on what we discussed:
Mentor.notCovered: Not covered in platform content yet — answered from general exam knowledge.
Mentor.threadCreateFailed: Couldn't start a conversation. Please try again.
Mentor.seedFromQuestion: I have a doubt about this question: {{stem}}

MicroDrill.title: Micro-drills
MicroDrill.description: Three-question, single-dimension sprints — write just an intro or just a conclusion and get scored on that alone.
MicroDrill.notEnoughData: Write a few full answers first and we'll recommend the drill that helps you most — or just pick one below.
MicroDrill.weakestDimension: Your weakest area right now is {{dimension}}.
MicroDrill.historyEmptyDescription: Your completed drills will show up here with their scores.
MicroDrill.noSessionDescription: Start a new micro-drill from your profile page.

StudyPlan.title: AI study plan
StudyPlan.description: A checkable weekly schedule built from your exam date, your profile, and how many hours you can give each day.
StudyPlan.regenerateCooldown: You can regenerate your plan again tomorrow.
StudyPlan.emptyDescription: Tell us how many hours a day you can study and we'll build a 7-day plan around your exam date.

Auth.title: Sign in to PrayasUP
Auth.subtitle: Continue with Google, or your email and password.
Auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
Auth.useCodeInstead: Email me a one-time code instead
Auth.signupCheckEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.
Auth.signInError: Couldn't sign in. Check your email and password.
Auth.otpError: That code didn't work. Check it and try again.
Auth.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Auth.callbackError: Sign-in didn't complete. Please try again.
Auth.terms: By continuing you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.
Auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
Auth.resetLinkSent: Check your email for a link to reset your password.
Auth.resetDescription: Choose a new password for your account.
Auth.resetLinkInvalid: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.
Auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 10 characters.
Auth.passwordTooCommon: That password is too common. Please choose a stronger one.
Auth.passwordHint: At least 10 characters, and not a commonly used password.

Onboarding.step1Sub: This takes under a minute and tailors the app to you.
Onboarding.handleHint: For the community later. 3–20 lowercase letters, numbers or _.
Onboarding.step2Sub: Pick your medium and the year you're aiming for.
Onboarding.step3Sub: We'll size your daily plan around this.
Onboarding.planHint: A 7-day plan built around your target date and weak areas. You can regenerate it anytime.
Onboarding.generatingSub: Analysing your syllabus and target date

Landing.heroTitleHi: अब आपकी मुख्य परीक्षा उत्तर-कॉपी AI जाँचेगा
Landing.heroTitleEn: AI evaluation for your UPPSC Mains answers
Landing.heroSub: Write typed or upload a handwritten answer. Get a UPPSC-style rubric score, examiner-grade feedback, and a model answer — in Hindi or English, in seconds.
Landing.heroCtaption: Free to start · No card needed
Landing.featuresTitle: Everything an aspirant needs, in one app
Landing.featuresSub: Built for UPPSC (UP PCS) — bilingual, PYQ-grounded, and honest about where you stand.
Landing.feature1Body: The flagship. Score any Mains answer against a six-dimension UPPSC rubric with streaming feedback, missed points, and a model answer. Type it or photograph your handwritten pages.
Landing.feature2Body: Thousands of previous-year questions, sectional sets, timed full-length mocks with real cut-offs, and a daily quiz targeted at your weak topics.
Landing.feature3Body: AI-generated, source-cited notes for every syllabus node, plus UP-focused daily current affairs summarised for the exam — with a monthly magazine.
Landing.feature4Body: FSRS-scheduled revision, mastery tracking per topic, streaks, and a profile that shows exactly where your marks are leaking.
Landing.pricingTitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.
Landing.pricingSub: Everything you need to begin is free. Pro unlocks unlimited AI evaluations.
Landing.plan_free_f3: A few AI answer evaluations / month
Landing.ctaSub: Join UPPSC aspirants preparing smarter with AI-checked answers and a plan built around your weak spots.

Community.hubDescription: Discuss PYQs, topics, and current affairs with fellow aspirants — and get peer feedback on your answers.
Community.myThreadsEmpty: You haven't started a discussion yet.
Community.recentThreadsEmptyDescription: No discussions yet — be the first to start one from any topic or PYQ page.
Community.openPeerReviewDescription: Answers shared by other aspirants for feedback.
Community.peerReviewEmptyDescription: Share one of your evaluated answers from the Answers section to invite feedback — or be the first to comment here.
Community.peerReviewFeedDescription: Real evaluated answers shared by aspirants — read, comment, and mark helpful replies.
Community.peerReviewDescription: Shared for peer review — the AI's scores are shown alongside the answer.
Community.peerReviewNotFound: This shared answer could not be found.
Community.emptyDescription: Be the first to ask or share something about this.
Community.threadLocked: This thread is locked to new replies.
Community.threadNotFound: This thread could not be found.

ReviewReports.emptyDescription: User reports on community posts and threads will appear here.

Pwa.offlineReady: PrayasUP is ready to work offline.
Pwa.settingsDescription: Get a nudge when today's quiz is ready, revision is due, or your streak needs a save.
Pwa.blockedHint: Notifications are blocked in your browser settings for this site. Enable them from your browser's site settings to turn this on.
Pwa.enableError: Couldn't enable notifications — please try again.
Pwa.prePromptBody: PrayasUP can send a quiet nudge when your daily quiz is ready, revision cards are due, or your streak is about to break. No spam — just study reminders, and you can turn any of these off anytime.
